title: Security: brute force attack prevention

Verify attack is detected and blocked
expected_result: brute force attack attempt is detected and blocked with appropriate error

title: Security: XSS injection prevention

steps: Submit malicious payload to input endpoint
Verify attack is detected and blocked
expected_result: XSS injection attempt is detected and blocked with appropriate error
